case_title: AUDIT PRO INCORPORATED VS ENDELEN SIGRID DBA LOMBARD PLAZA MOTEL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENDELEN SIGRID DBA LOMBARD PLAZA MOTEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUDIT PRO INCORPORATED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENDELEN SIGRID DBA LOMBARD PLAZA MOTEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,022.23 FILED BY AUDIT PRO INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT ENDELEN SIGRID DBA LOMBARD PLAZA MOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $710.90 FILED BY ENDELEN SIGRID DBA LOMBARD PLAZA MOTEL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AUDIT PRO INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-09-1994, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAY-24-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
CERTIFIED MAILING TO AUDIT PRO, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ENDELEN SIGRID DBA LOMBARD PLAZA MOTEL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ENDELEN SIGRID DBA LOMBARD PLAZA MOTEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AUDIT PRO INCORPORATED CROSS DEFT ENTITLED TO KEEP ALL SUMS COLLECTED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
